rationale: Both candidates converge on the same unverified narrative (PR #4834 intentionally guards level=2 wake, the test is stale, and main already has the fix) — but the actual thread shows the issue still under active triage, with yenuo26 asking Flink-ddd to investigate and Flink-ddd asking to trigger a full CI run, not a confirmed resolution. That contradicts both candidates' confident 'safe to close' stance. X at least hedges ('if your CI ran against an older commit... please confirm') rather than asserting closure outright, while Y invents unverifiable specifics (exact PR title, merge date, named regression tests test_level2_sleep_wake_raises/test_partial_wake_blocks_generate/test_duplicate_wake_is_idempotent, 'Repro A/B/C' labels) that appear nowhere in the given context, making it read as more grounded while actually being more fabricated. Neither matches the ground truth's genuinely open, still-investigating resolution.
